items.title: Jim Cramer Says McDonald’s “Understands What Our Customers in Our Country and the World are Going Through”
items.description: McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer recently shared thoughts on. Cramer noted the company cutting prices on its products. He said: “Or how about a stock like McDonald’s? Headlines come out this morning, they say it’s a big disappointment, a huge disappointment. It was a big miss on revenues, big miss […]
